vulnerabilities.description: CORS configuration is missing. This can lead to security vulnerabilities by allowing requests from any origin.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement CORS middleware with a whitelist of allowed origins to restrict access.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is defined in environment variables but not implemented in the application logic.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add rate limiting middleware to API endpoints based on the defined `RATE_LIMIT_MAX` and `RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW`.

vulnerabilities.description: No middleware for validating JWT tokens implemented in the application. This can allow unauthorized access to protected routes.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement JWT authentication middleware that checks for valid tokens on all protected routes.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization for routes is not shown. This can leave the application vulnerable to injection attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Use input validation libraries (like Joi or express-validator) to sanitize and validate user inputs.
